changes: Ice Spikes: Adjusted to not be applied simultaneously with Veil of the Whorl and Schiltron
Veil of the Whorl: Adjusted to not be applied simultaneously with Ice Spikes and Schiltron
Aetheric Mimicry: Healer now increases the potency of all healing effects
Schiltron: Added as a learnable action
